purpose: Operator-safe privileged handoff for activating commit 2722ee19 into the live eeepc /opt runtime.

deploy_commit.subject: Use recorded task plans for next cycle selection

verification_commands:
sudo python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import json
root = Path('/opt/eeepc-agent/runtimes/self-evolving-agent/current')
reports = sorted(root.glob('reports/evolution-*.json'), key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime)
if not reports:
    raise SystemExit('no report files found')
report = reports[-1]
data = json.loads(report.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
print(f'report={report}')
print(f"selected_tasks={data.get('selected_tasks')}")
print(f"task_selection_source={data.get('task_selection_source')}")
PY
operator_notes: Unpack side-by-side, then switch current; do not edit the live tree in place.
Stop before extract if the archive hash check fails.
The next report should surface selected_tasks and task_selection_source from the recorded-task-plan path.
